summary: The diff shows integration of an HD image into the About Us page hero section (REQ-2), but there is no evidence of the actual image file generation (REQ-1). The implementation references '/assets/generated/about-hero.dim_1920x1080.png' but the file was not added in this diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate a high-definition (1920x1080) realistic image suitable for the About Us page hero section
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no added image files. While the AboutUs.tsx references '/assets/generated/about-hero.dim_1920x1080.png', the actual image file is not present in the ADDED FILES section. The acceptance criteria requires the image to be generated and saved in frontend/public/assets/generated directory.
evidence: frontend/src/pages/AboutUs.tsx (references image but file not added)

hallucinated_features.description: Additional image 'about-mission-vision.dim_1200x800.png' referenced in Mission & Vision section
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest only specified one image (about-hero.dim_1920x1080.png) for the hero section. The code references a second image '/assets/generated/about-mission-vision.dim_1200x800.png' that was not requested.
